3305630.name: Sword Tale : Lost Excalibur
3305630.description:
Sword Tale: Lost Excalibur is a third-person action-adventure game that blends sword-based combat with an emotional journey through a war-torn fantasy world. As a lone warrior, you cross paths with a mysterious girl who holds the key to an ancient secret—and you must protect her at all costs from the relentless knights who hunt her down.

Explore ruined castles, dense forests, and forgotten battlegrounds as you uncover the truth behind the legend of the lost Excalibur. Use intuitive mouse and keyboard controls to engage in dynamic melee combat and make choices that affect the story’s outcome.

This game was designed as a tribute to classic fantasy storytelling and the spirit of indie game development.

Features:

🗡️ Legendary Swords with Unique Conditions
Discover multiple swords throughout the game, each with its own distinct abilities and requirements. Choose wisely based on your strategy and playstyle.

⚔️ Charge Attacks for Greater Power

Hold your attack to charge up your sword, unleashing a more powerful strike. Perfect for breaking through enemy defenses or turning the tide in a tough battle.

☠️ Zeberos Sword – Power at a Price
A cursed sword of darkness that will never break—but continuously drains your health while equipped. High risk, high reward for those brave enough to wield it.

While compact in scope, Sword Tale: Lost Excalibur aims to deliver a focused and immersive experience with a cinematic narrative and stylized visuals. It’s a student-developed final project, crafted by a team of passionate game developers from the Bachelor of Science in Digital Game Simulation program, Faculty of Science and Technology, University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce.
